---
title: "Charlotte Louisa Hawkins Dempster"
---

## Charlotte Louisa Hawkins Dempster

**Dates:** (1835-1913)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1888,1892), novelist

### Biography

She also wrote travel books.  CMY called her ‘rather a great gun’ and is not mentioned in her <i>The Manners of My Time : Reminiscences</i> (1920).  She lived at Villa Rey, Cannes.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
